case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. JOSUE MISAEL ARIAS ORTIZ

docket_entries.description: JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR OPORTUN, INC. ASSIGNED TO JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORTIZ, JOSUE MISAEL ARIAS $917.21 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $997.21 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
